player_ship.notes: Generated S144 v12 material-baked layered hardpoint craft with retuned rougher anodized-metal materials, darker retaining brackets, calmer glow, and less glossy toy/plastic response. Geometry remains the S132 2450-triangle layout with clearer canopy, rear stabilizers, intakes, engine nozzles, wing hardpoints, Ultra sockets, canards, shield generator leaves, shield capacitor lenses, shield relay heat sinks, shield arc sockets, upgrade bus rails, wing fold hinges, drone lock claws, escort launch sleeves, escort weapon pivots, escort refuel probes, escort lock beacons, escort service panels, sensor lenses, splitter prisms, wing auxiliary cannons, wing storm rails, wing splitter emitters, wing capacitor caps, outer muzzle lenses, cooling fins, underwing pylons, auxiliary feed rails, ammo cells, drone outer guides, escort release tabs, sync beacons, drone charge cables, drone power sockets, nose rail shrouds, nose ceramic cheeks, nose muzzle micro lenses, nose heat sinks, rear external weapon pylons, side/rear ordnance pods, ceramic faces, muzzle cores, heat-slot details, ceramic armor caps, recessed fasteners, barrel shrouds, and service panels. Export is baked down to material groups to keep draw calls low. Nose points toward positive Y in game space. Keep wings, forward rails, shield nodes, escort mounts, and rear pods inside the current mobile safe width.

enemy_drone.notes: Generated S141 layered sensor-winglet asset is enabled as a batched enemy model runtime test. It includes side sensors, inner winglets, wing marks, matte nose clamp, service panel steps, wing edge rails, rear antenna fin, tail signal lens, and a small muzzle glow for attack-source readability. If loading fails, the procedural drone fallback remains active.

enemy_skimmer.notes: Generated S141 cold-edge layered asset is enabled as a batched enemy model runtime test. It includes acceleration slits, forward canards, cold edge nodes, dark service spine, cold edge frames, tail vanes, tail cold lens, and a needle muzzle glow for attack-source readability. If loading fails, the procedural skimmer fallback remains active.

enemy_sentinel.notes: Generated S141 braced-cannon layered asset is enabled as a batched enemy model runtime test. It includes side cannons, cannon braces, heat-sink ribs, armor buckles, shoulder service plates, warning ticks, a brighter cannon muzzle, rear stabilizers, and warning lens. If loading fails, the procedural sentinel fallback remains active.

enemy_wraith.notes: Generated S141 phase-blade layered asset is enabled as a batched enemy model runtime test. It includes phase beacons, outer phase vanes, arc tips, mirror frames, front phase cap, spine nodes, rear black retainer, a rear phase socket, and twin phase muzzle points. If loading fails, the procedural wraith fallback remains active.

enemy_bulwark.notes: Generated S141 siege-plating layered asset is enabled as a batched enemy model runtime test. It includes shield slabs, mortar muzzle and breach block, pressure vents, siege rivets, upper armor seams, track locks, lower tread/ram plates, and a reactive armor lens. If loading fails, the procedural bulwark fallback remains active.

boss_01.notes: Generated S141 broad-cannon layered model is enabled through the batched runtime model path, with procedural fallback preserved if loading fails. Center rail guards, charge rings, heat banks, wingtip emitters, guarded scatter-petal sockets, sync lenses, micro nozzles, lower bloom nozzles, heat fins, bloom crown tips, dark wing laminates, heat slots, retainers, and reactor lenses should read clearly from the top-down camera.

boss_02.notes: Generated S141 armored-carrier layered model is enabled through the batched runtime model path, with procedural fallback preserved if loading fails. Hangar frames, deck command towers, interceptor launch rails, bay floors, deck clamps, warning lamps, micro-fighter silhouettes, launch power cables, shield projectors, siege cannon, broadside muzzles, deck black laminates, heat ribs, command bridge, and command lens should distinguish it from boss_01.

boss_03.notes: Generated S141 spine-flagship layered model is enabled through the batched runtime model path, with procedural fallback preserved if loading fails. Split muzzle points, crown petal emitters, outer crown prongs, lock-on dishes, framed phase mirrors, mirror lens tips, phase-curtain wide mirrors, prism nozzles, spike arrays, spine shadow channels, black laminates, retainers, warning needles, and central spine lens should reinforce the flagship silhouette.
